resource.name: Standard.TypeUnknown
resource.object: This handler cannot handle data of type

resource.name: Standard.NoObjectFile
resource.object: No object file returned from reader.

resource.name: Standard.ErrorHalted
resource.object: Error in data and read halted.

resource.name: Standard.ErrorNotHalted
resource.object: Error in data but not halted.

resource.name: Standard.NoProcess
resource.object: Could not find process unit with code

resource.name: Standard.NoActivity
resource.object: Could not find Activity with code: {0} or the record could be inactive

resource.name: Standard.NoPO
resource.object: Could not find Purchase Order with code

resource.name: Standard.NoLot
resource.object: Could not find Lot with code

resource.name: Standard.NoPlot
resource.object: Could not find Plot with code

resource.name: Standard.NoRmArea
resource.object: Could not find RmArea with code

resource.name: Standard.NoShift
resource.object: Could not find shift with code

resource.name: Standard.InvalidRecordType
resource.object: Invalid record type ({0}) received in import, no configuration exists.

resource.name: Standard.ReqForeignKey
resource.object: Required foreign key for property: '{0}' with value: '{1}' not found

resource.name: Standard.ForeignKeyInfo
resource.object: Foreign key for property: '{0}' with value: '{1}' not found. \nRecord creation continues as this value is for nullable column. \nIf this column is marked as required in the process setup then the record validation failes when the record is inserted to the database else this record will be accepted.

resource.name: Standard.TypeNotFound
resource.object: Type {0} not found in loaded assemblies

resource.name: Standard.TransactionalUnitOp
resource.object: Transactional property for unit operation import handler is not allowed to be true.

resource.name: Standard.TransactionalAction
resource.object: Transactional property for action import handler is not allowed to be true.

resource.name: DBSP.ImportFailed
resource.object: Exception when importing from db stored procedure

resource.name: Import.MQXFailed
resource.object: Exception when handling receiving message id

resource.name: Standard.ProcessContextOption
resource.object: Process Context option for {0} not enabled in handler configuration

resource.name: AlarmDesc
resource.object: Receiving site received message from hub
